Dev.releaseNotes:
`feat` (`api`): **Expose group user data on the user data service**:

Exposed `IGroupUserData` abstraction with watch stats (aggregated from
series), runtime-shimmed `LastEpisodeUpdatedAt`/`LastVideoUpdatedAt`
for ordering, and editable `UserTags`. Added service methods on
`IUserDataService`, `GET/PUT/PATCH /api/v3/Group/{id}/UserData`
endpoints, `GetUserData` on `IShokoGroup`, and SignalR events
(`group.saved`). DB migrations add `UserTags` and `LastUpdated`
columns to `AnimeGroup_User`.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to v6.0.0-alpha.57**.

`fix` (`abstractions`): **Restore lost fuzzy match filter expressions**:

Recreated `StringFuzzyMatchesExpression` and `AnyFuzzyMatchesExpression`
in `Shoko.Abstractions` following the same pattern as the existing
`HasFuzzyNameExpression` - using `IFuzzySearchService` via static
resolution from `ISystemService.StaticServices`. These were accidentally
dropped during the refactor move to abstractions in 0f9d9df.

`chore`: **Sort imports & remove unnecessary imports**. (_Skip CI_)

`misc`: **Better Fuzzy Search**.
`misc`: **Cleanup**.
`fix`: **Fix filters**.

`fix`: **Add missing `ISeriesUserData.LastEpisodeUpdatedAt` in abstraction**.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to 6.0.0-alpha.56**.
`misc`: **Don't hide raw sql in versions table when raw sql was ran**.
`misc`: **Make the FixEmptyXrefPrimaryImageIDs Use Direct SQL**.

`fix`: **Properly control log level of signalr target**.

`feat`: **Add per target log level configuration**:

Supplementing the existing trace log option.

`fix`: **Don't use virtual class member in class constructor**.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to 6.0.0-alpha.55**.
`fix`: **Correct ending index for release notes range**.

`refactor` (`tmdb`): **Overhaul TMDB metadata sync with orphan cleanup, Changes API, and circuit-breaker hardening** ([#1358](https://github.com/ShokoAnime/ShokoServer/pull/1358)):

Full rewrite of the `TmdbMetadataService` movie/season/episode/person sync
pipeline with TMDB Changes API support for skipping unchanged data,
orphaned cast/crew cleanup on transient failures, and circuit-breaker
dispatch hardening.

`chore`: **Don't sort plugin pages alphabetically**.

`fix`: **Save and restore min/max server version in local version cache**:

The locally-cached WebReleaseVersionInformation was not saving
MinimumServerVersion and MaximumServerVersion when created from
the server version endpoint, and was not restoring
MaximumServerVersion when loading from the cached info.

`refactor`: **Add release notes aggregation for webui and server version lookups**:

Aggregate release notes between the currently-installed version and the
latest compatible version for both `GetLatestWebComponentVersion` and
`GetLatestServerVersion`, instead of returning the raw manifest entry's
release notes.

Cap the aggregated notes at 20 entries and append "..." when truncated
to avoid excessively long descriptions.

Switches `GetLatestServerVersion` from direct `FetchManifestAsync` access
to `GetServerHistory` so it works entirely through
`ReleaseVersionInformation` objects without touching `ManifestEntry`.

Also removes the dev. to stable channel fallback in
`GetLatestWebComponentVersion` as moving between channels can be
catastrophic at times, so it should not be done automatically.

`fix`: **Correct tmdb movie link on shoko episode in abstraction**.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to 6.0.0-alpha.54**.

`fix`: **Also correct the underlying impl. for the tmdb movies field**.

`fix`: **Correct next up & continue watching episode logic**.

`misc`: **Remove mentions of JMM in code**.

`fix`: **Ensure we only check valid guid/uuids in repo**.

`fix`: **Correct empty primary ids on image xrefs**.
`refactor`: **Move APIv3 auth endpoint to APIv3, fix missing token from APIv3 response**.

`feat` (`filtering`): **Add missing and unaired episode counts, selectors, and is restricted expression**:

Added `MissingEpisodeCounts` and `UnairedEpisodeCounts` as `EpisodeCounts`
properties on `IFilterableInfo`, `IShokoSeries`, and `IShokoGroup`. Both
are computed on-the-fly from `AniDB_Episode.HasAired` and local file
availability — missing = aired without local files, unaired = not yet
aired without local files.

Added 26 expression/selector/sorting files for per-type filtering and
sorting on missing and unaired counts, plus an `IsRestrictedExpression`
info expression that wraps the new `IFilterableInfo.IsRestricted`.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump version to 6.0.0-alpha.53**.
`misc`: **Hopefully fix stats refresh**.
`fix`: **Fix episode aired flag when series end date is wrong**.

`feat`: **Add periodic image maintenance job with auto-purge and auto-validate**:

Adds a `PeriodicImageMaintenanceJob` that runs every 24 hours and
conditionally purges orphaned images and validates image integrity
based on two new ImageSettings toggles (`AutoPurge`, `AutoValidate`).

- `AutoPurge` (default: on) — removes orphaned images older than 7 days
- `AutoValidate` (default: off) — checks all available images for
  corruption and re-queues downloads for broken ones

  Closes #1078

`feat` (`abstractions`): **Add IImageCrossReferenceResolver for plugin xref routes**:

Added IImageCrossReferenceResolver interface in the abstractions layer
for plugins to register custom entity resolution in the image
cross-reference system. Implemented resolver fallback in
GetEntityForImage and TryGetMetadataForEntity when the built-in switch
does not match the (DataSource, DataEntityType) combination.

- Added Plugin = 0xFB to DataSource enum for plugin-provided data
- Added Franchise = Collection alias and Library = 12 to DataEntityType
- Added AddParts and ImageCrossReferenceResolvers to IImageManager
- Registered resolvers in PluginManager.InitPlugins

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump version to 6.0.0-alpha.51**.
`fix`: **Re-use the last imported at date if the release URI matches between the old and new release**.

`fix`: **Silently return if web component version is not in the list of available versions to install**.

`fix`: **Don't change import date when finding the existing release**.

`feat` (`filtering`): **Add `All`/`Any` `StartsWith` and `EndsWith` string set expressions**:

- Added `AllStartsWithExpression`, `AllEndsWithExpression`,
  `AnyStartsWithExpression`, and `AnyEndsWithExpression`

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to 6.0.0-alpha.50**.

`chore`: **Remove unused imports**.

`feat` (`filtering`): **Add `AbsoluteFilePaths`, `ContainingFolderPaths`, and generic expression types**:

- Added `AbsoluteFilePaths` and `ContainingFolderPaths` to `IFilterableInfo`
  with implementations in `Filterable`, `FilterExtensions`, and `TestFilterable`
- Created `AbsoluteFilePathsSelector` and `ContainingFolderPathsSelector`
- Moved `GenericFilter` into the `Generic` sub-namespace
- Added `GenericFilterExpression` and `GenericSortingExpression` for plugins
  with overloaded constructors accepting `Handler` delegates

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to 6.0.0-alpha.49**.

`fix` (`tmdb`): **Lower default rate limit from 30 to 10 requests per second**:

Conservative default to avoid overwhelming end-user hardware with API
requests and the data processing each response triggers.

`fix` (`tmdb`): **Correct episodesToSave inversion and fix purge method issues**:

- Fix inverted `episodesToSave.IsEmpty` check — was returning `changed=true`
  when no episodes changed, causing spurious DB saves and `OnSeriesUpdated`
  events on every quick-refresh pass
- `PurgeAllUnusedMovies` / `PurgeAllUnusedShows`: replace chained `Concat`
  iterators with `HashSet.UnionWith`; eliminates duplicate `GetAll()` on the
  AniDB xref table
- `PurgeUnlinkedShowNetworks`: precompute linked network ID set; add re-check
  under lock to prevent purging a network re-linked by a concurrent show update;
  fix log message copy-paste ("staff members" → "networks")
- `PurgeUnlinkedPeople`: extract `GetLinkedPersonIds()` as single source of
  truth for the four cast/crew tables; eliminates N+1 queries

`chore` (`tmdb`): **Fix log placeholder casing in PurgeUnlinkedShowNetworks**. (_Skip CI_)

`chore` (`tmdb`): **Fix `contentRanting` typo in local variable names**.

`fix`: **Nothing to see here, move along**:

…totally didn't forget to remove them from the constructor in the last commit.
`fix`: **Revert faulty `Lazy<TService>` usage as ASP.NET did not like that**.
